arguments.name: There is no input for this command.

description: Get Installed Applications starting with "adobe reader" from all machines
examples:
Command Example
!tn-get-all-saved-actions
Context Example
Tanium:{
SavedActions:[{
distribute_seconds:0
public_flag:0
action_group_id:0
name: tn-get-all-saved-actions

outputs.description: Distribute seconds of action Tanium.SavedActions.public_flag Whether action is public or not
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedActions.distribute_seconds

outputs.description: Group ID of action Tanium.SavedActions.approver.id ID of the user who approved the action
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedActions.action_group_id

outputs.description: Action name Tanium.SavedActions.user.id ID of the user who created the action
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: date Time the action was created Tanium.SavedActions.end_time
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedActions.creation_time

outputs.description: Time the action ended Tanium.SavedActions.status Action status
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: date Last time action started Tanium.SavedActions.id
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedActions.last_start_time

outputs.description: ID of action Tanium.SavedActions.package_spec.id The package associated with the action
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Whether action was approved or not
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedActions.approved_flag
